qa_result.question: What is the overall stance of the speaker who said 'The truth is, my heart is not in this fight. You know me, I'm not a wheeler-dealer. I can put my mind to policy, but I'm no good at this brand of politics.' in the whole conversation?
options: A. Finally agrees to step down from the frontline position of promoting the education bill, and only provides support as a policy advisor
B. Insists on taking full responsibility for all events entirely by himself
C. Firmly opposes other people taking over the education-related projects he has led for many years
D. Cannot judge
qa_result.answer_text: Finally agrees to step down from the frontline position of promoting the education bill, and only provides support as a policy advisor
